creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
^Triage: Please remember to fill in the "PR:" field in your commit messages. Also, please try to be more complete in your PRs: in this case a reference to PR #241495 helps making clearer why you think maintainer is inactive. I have added it for you in the "See also:" field.
Finally, please set the maintainer-approval attachment flag (to ?) and set the requestee field to the e-mail address of the maintainer to ask for maintainer approval when you submit a patch, even if the maintainer-feedback flag has already been set for the PR.

Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [?]

In this case I am not adding the flag because there is no approval to ask any more.



Fixed by the following commit:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=6447a45afe8c992e30b01b7e0ca6aa49ff334888
